generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure is making us vulnerable? Just last year, a small cyber incident in a key ally caused delays in our emergency response systems. We can't afford to wait for another crisis to act. It's time to prioritize strategic autonomy - for our safety and our future. #NationalSecurityFirst
